title: Stop Prompting Claude. Start Loop Engineering.
summary: Loop Engineering (Claude Loops) is a framework for building AI systems that move beyond single prompts to iterative loops with five core components: triggers, execution skills, goal verification, output handling, and memory. The approach is positioned as an advancement from traditional prompting practices.
